messages.text: quick check‑in: got the product‑team Slack ping, will hop on the stand‑up in 5 min.
morning chaos – Ingrid threw a full‑blown tantrum over cereal. I’m stuck in the kitchen, need a vent. 😅
hey, can you glance at the NDA draft I attached? need to make sure I’m not over‑promising in the OFW reply.
thinking about bedtime stories for Ingrid – maybe “The Little Engine” tonight? any other favorites you remember from when we were kids?
morning status: pulled the latest analytics for the sprint, will push the repo update after lunch.
just saw Henrik’s email – the tone is *so* passive‑aggressive. sending you a meme to lighten the mood 🤦‍♀️
Saturday soccer at 10 am – can we lock in car‑pools? I can take Theo and Ingrid if anyone needs a lift.
quick q: are we still on track for the data‑export by Friday? need to align my UI mockups.
(voice memo) i’m feeling like i’m losing control tonight… the kids, the court, everything. just needed to get it out.
draft OFW reply – *maybe* we can keep the drop‑off at the park? need to sound cooperative but firm.
status update: bug #421 fixed, but I’m a bit behind on the UI specs – will catch up by EOD.
urgent: need eyes on this OFW draft. can you flag any language that sounds too “yes‑man”?
thanks for listening earlier. i finally fell asleep after 3 am – needed that ear.
acknowledged the legal‑doc request – pulling the files now.
please review the motion draft attached. deadline is tomorrow, any red flags?
uploaded final motion, receipt confirmed. fingers crossed.
brief status: sprint demo prep is half‑done, will be slower today – juggling court prep.
thanks for the pep talk earlier. feeling steadier now – coffee later?
(voice memo) tomorrow’s court logistics: arrive 8:30, bring kids’ schedules, keep phone on silent.
responding to your question – yes, the API endpoint is live. let me know if you need anything else.
look at Theo’s latest painting – he called it “space rockets”. sending a photo!
week was rough. can we meet for coffee Thursday? need a solid friend vibe.
morning, kids are good. quick question – any tips on the new iPad parental‑control settings? trying not to lose my mind today 😅
need clarification on the new consent flow – does the latest spec still require explicit opt‑in for third‑party data sharing?
attached the updated OFW draft PDF. let me know if anything still looks risky before I file.
quick look at this OFW screenshot before I send? (see attached)
data dump for Q2 ready, can you review when you have a sec?
just saw a meme about ‘mom brain’ – needed that laugh 😂
kids slept early, we’re ordering pizza tonight. hope you’re doing ok back home.
got the hearing notice, will have brief ready by 5 pm. let me know if any last‑minute tweaks.
requesting a 24‑hour extension for exhibit upload – awaiting confirmation.
just finished filing, feeling wiped. coffee tomorrow?
final prototype ready for handoff – let me know if anything needs polishing.
quick sanity check on this OFW paragraph – tone too soft? (screenshot attached)
thanks for the pep talk earlier, needed it. feeling a bit steadier now.
i’m terrified they’ll take the kids, can’t stop thinking about the night when… (voice memo attached)
sent you the OFW reply I drafted at 3 am, please read before I hit send.
kids are sleepy, we’ll video‑call later tonight. miss you.
bug #342 resolved, can you push to staging?
just exported the chat, feeling exposed. thanks for holding space.
kids are asleep, I’m going to read a chapter of the memoir before bed. love you.
in the lobby, see you in 5 min.
it went okay, but I’m still shaking. thanks for being my rock after today.
thanks for the draft review, I think I’ll hold off on sending anything further today.
ugh, traffic was a nightmare – the kids are clingier than usual. maybe I'm wrong but I’m feeling the strain.
just uploaded the latest findings PDF to the shared drive – let me know if the stats look good.
totally fine, whatever works for you.
quick favor: can you skim my draft OFW reply and suggest any tweaks?
[voice memo] 3 am again… looping thoughts about the kids and the case. needed to get it out.
hey Annika, hope you’re well – just checking in about weekend plans?
maybe we can keep the kids at my place Friday night?
just needed someone who gets it tonight.
patient symptom log attached – could we get a call ASAP?
kid’s temp is 101… I’m freaking out, need to vent.
my kid’s sick – can we push tomorrow’s drop‑off?
can you glance at the revised custody‑schedule doc before I send?
[voice memo] I’m scared the phone is listening. I need to change passwords.
quick check‑in – how’s your weekend shaping up?
could you send me info on ear‑infection treatment options?
thanks for listening earlier, needed that.
[car call] morning vent – I’m exhausted.
I’ll have the kids ready for pickup at 3:30.
shared the updated custody‑schedule spreadsheet – thoughts?
[voice memo] raw confession – Jordan… I know it’s stupid but I can’t stop thinking about it.
Kids are with me, see you Friday night.
I’m at Henrik’s, can’t talk now.
I’m okay, just need a quiet night to finish the docs.
I’m about to delete everything – help me decide?
good morning – quick check‑in.
please review the final OFW response before I hit send.
I’ve sent the revised schedule, let me know if anything else is needed.
I’m done, please don’t reply.

Review legal docs on Google Drive (Divorce Docs folder)
Wine (1 glass) + laptop: catch up on unread Gmail (14 k msgs)
Prepare dinner, play Spotify ‘Atlas of the Heart’
Open Google Docs – start drafting motion for temporary custody (deadline 6 pm)
Zoom call with attorney – discuss filing strategy
Deep‑work: incorporate attorney feedback into filing
Prepare dinner, watch news (NYT app) for 10 min
Evening laptop session: catch up on Slack threads missed Friday

Mid‑day check‑in with legal aid (30 min)
